mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID AS stockId, STOCK_NAME AS stockName FROM STOCKS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ( UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR STOCK_ID LIKE #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{q}) || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, STOCK_NAME FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT STOCK_ID AS stockId, STOCK_NAME AS stockName, STOCK_SECTOR AS stockSector, IS_ACTIVE AS isActive FROM STOCKS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ( UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR STOCK_ID LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{q}) || '%' THEN 0 WHEN STOCK_ID LIKE #{q} || '%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, STOCK_NAME OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
